Crime Against Women Dataset for Dark Spot identification in India

Published: 21 February 2022| Version 1 | DOI: 10.17632/whrdh8c5zb.1
Contributor:
Anjum Patel

Description

data is about district wise crime against women in India from 2001 to 2020 along with predominant factors which affects to crime against woman such as literacy rate of Male and female
column500: working status of male and female etc. data describes crime patterns of Rape
column502: Assault on woman with outrage to her modesty
column504: Cruelty by husband or his relatives
column505: Importation of girls from foreign countries
column506: Dowry deaths. In addition to this
column507: we added district wise data of census including parameter as female literacy rate
column512:
non workers) etc.

Files

Steps to reproduce

data was collected from NCRB portal and census.gov. this secondary data is compiled with required parameters and analyzed in tabular manner so researchers can use for their analysis.

Categories

Crime Analysis
